scripts.d1:init:local: wrangler d1 execute bichae-db --local --file=./migrations/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute bichae-db --local --file=./migrations/seed.sql
scripts.d1:query:local: wrangler d1 execute bichae-db --local --command="SELECT * FROM products;"
scripts.d1:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute bichae-db --remote --file=./migrations/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute bichae-db --remote --file=./migrations/seed.sql
